title: LoamLab Camera
scene_empty: No scenes found. Go to Window → Scenes in SketchUp to add one.
scene_empty_desc: Follow the steps below to add a scene in SketchUp, then click refresh.
scene_empty_step1: Navigate to the angle you want to render
scene_empty_step2: Go to View → Animation → Add Scene
scene_empty_step3: Reopen the plugin to see your scenes
alert_no_scene: Please select at least one scene to render!
alert_no_scene_setup:
No scenes found in this model!
Please go to Window → Scenes in SketchUp and add at least one scene before rendering.
login_subtitle: Manage your points and license keys
prompt_helper: ℹ️ Leave blank if no special requests
prompt_ph: e.g. Leather sofa, wooden floor, warm lighting...
preview_select_hint: Check scenes on the right to preview...
tool_furniture_hint: ✏️ Select a rendered image as base. Mask any area or the whole scene — AI reforms it precisely while preserving structure and lighting.
tool_furniture_ph: e.g. Nordic style, warm wood tone, minimalist...
tool_ninegrid_hint: 📸 AI generates a single 3×3 grid image showcasing 9 cinematic camera angles. Choose a shot style and render.
tool_ninegrid_ph: e.g. high-end residential, warm sunset mood...
tool_swap_hint: ① Select base image from history → ② Describe the material to replace → ③ Click the button below to open the mask painter
base_image_pick: Click to select base image from history
base_image_required: Please select a base image from history first
pricing_subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your architectural pipeline.
auto_save_hint: Renders auto-save to this folder — no manual download needed
already_subscribed: You are already on this plan. Visit the customer portal to manage your subscription.
share_text:
I'm using LoamLab for AI rendering in SketchUp — looks incredible!
📥 Free download: https://github.com/loamlabstudio/loamlab-releases/releases/latest/download/loamlab_plugin.rbz
🎁 Enter invite code {code} after installing to get 100 free pts
share_copied_line: ✓ Copied! Paste it in LINE to share
share_copied_wa: ✓ Copied! Paste it in WhatsApp to share
referral_toast: 🎉 Your friend completed their first render — +300 pts have been added to your account!
aha_render_done: ✨ Beautiful! Love the result? Upgrade to keep creating.
paywall_banner: Need {cost} pts, balance {balance} pts — top up to continue
login_polling_sub: We've opened your browser. Please complete Google login — this window will close automatically.
history_empty: Renders will appear here after your first render
sc_subtitle: Hover to highlight, click to select, type your change
sc_region_empty:
Use Magic Wand or Brush
to select areas to replace
sc_guide_1_p: Click with the Wand for auto-select, or switch to Brush for freehand. Select multiple zones at once.
sc_guide_2_p: Each zone gets its own description. e.g. "concrete wall", "warm oak floor", "nordic minimal".
sc_guide_ref_p: Tap 🖼 on any zone card to add a style reference image. AI will blend your text and visual input.
sc_no_regions: Please select at least one region
tut_choice_desc: We show 2-3 step guides the first time you use each tool. Reopen anytime via the ? button.
share_modal_subtitle: Invite our official IG as a collaborator. Get +300 points after official review!
share_modal_qr_desc: Scan to copy the generated text and your referral link directly to your Instagram App.
share_modal_preview_label: IG Preview (Hashtags added for official review)
share_modal_image_select: Select Images to Share (Must include Before/After) *Click history
share_qr_hint:
[TBD] 選好渲染圖
填好文字後
點下方建立 QR

share_pc_desc: [TBD] 複製文字 → 開 IG 網頁 → 右鍵存圖 → 邀請 @loamlab_barbarian 協作
